name: default
desc: Fieldsets are saved to a separate file to allow them to be re-used in other forms.  If you wish to use a previously created fieldset, select the filename from the list below

use_array_field.label: Store data in array
use_array_field.tootlip: If selected, values will show up in $_REQUEST underneath an array with the fieldset id

existing_field.label: Filename
existing_field.tooltip: (Optional) Select existing fieldset from this list to re-use fields from an existing fieldset. A new fieldset will be created if none is specified.

data.confirm: Warning: Changing src file will close the fieldset you are currently editing

copy_field.tooltip: Create a new fieldset by copying fields from existing fieldset

delete_field.tooltip: Delete the fieldset definition.  **Important: This will remove the fields from any form using this fieldset!  Select 'create new' from the 'Fieldset to use' field if you want to preserve existing fieldset for use in other forms

data.message: **Important: This will remove fields from all forms using this fieldset!**Are you sure you want to delete fields?  Select 'create new' from the 'Fieldset to use' field if you wish to preserve fields for use in other forms.
